action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current stability index, current total weight load, and maximum capacity of a specific vessel.

vessel_id.description: The name or ID of the vessel (e.g., 'VANGUARD-7').

action_set_definitions.name: get_onboard_manifest
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all containers currently on the vessel with details on weight, tier position, cargo type, and safety classifications.

vessel_id.description: The name or ID of the vessel.

action_set_definitions.name: get_port_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all containers at the dock ready for loading, including destination, priority, and weight.

vessel_id.description: The vessel these containers are intended for.

action_set_definitions.name: offload_container
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the removal of a specific container from the vessel.

vessel_id.description: The name or ID of the vessel.

container_id.description: The unique ID of the container to offload.

action_set_definitions.name: load_container
action_set_definitions.description: Loads a specific container from the port into a designated tier on the vessel.

vessel_id.description: The name or ID of the vessel.

container_id.description: The unique ID of the container to load.

target_tier.description: The tier level (e.g., '01', '02' for bottom; '05' or higher for top).

state_description.current_metrics: Real-time status of the ship's load.
state_description.onboard_manifest: List of containers currently loaded on the ship
state_description.port_inventory: List of containers at the dock waiting to be loaded
